en: Many, numerous. Prove, justify. Agree, concur.
ko: Many, numerous(수많은). Prove, justify(증명하다). Agree, concur(동의하다). Good, advantageous(유리한). Bad, detrimental(해로운). Show,
vi: Many nhieu, numerous dong dao. Prove chung minh, justify bao chua. Agree dong y, concur tan dong.
Good tot, advantageous co loi. Bad xau, detrimental co hai. Show trinh bay,

en: Elucidate. However, conversely. So, subsequently. Ask, inquire. Be careful, be.
ko: elucidate(설명하다). However, conversely(반대로). So, subsequently(그 후에). Ask, inquire(질문하다). Be careful, be
zhTW: elucidate闡明。However然而，conversely相反。So所以，subsequently隨後。Ask問，inquire詢問。Be careful小心，
vi: elucidate giai thich. However tuy nhien, conversely nguoc lai. So vi vay, subsequently sau do. Ask hoi, inquire tham van. Be careful can than,
